MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Mar-07-2006 Vacated

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-07-2006 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Sep-22-2005 Set For Trial On Mar-27-06 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206; Settlement Conference On Mar-08-06 At 03:30 P.M. In Dept 306

Notice Of Hearing For Preliminary Injunction After An Order To Show Cause Issued By The Court; Declaration Of Inderpreet Sawhney And Vijay Kumar In Support
Off Calendar May-19-2005 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
Inderpreet Sawhney, Esq. of The Chugh Firm, 408-565-0600 for plaintiff and moving party Amber India Corporation. Ray Rockwell, Esq., 925-932-7785 for defendant and opposing party American KTK. Gerald Ramiza, Esq. of McDonough, Holland & Allen, 510-273-8780 for defendants and opposing party Pacific Partners. J. Scott McKay, Esq. of Boyd and McKay, 415-433-2700 for intervener and opposing party, Howard Restaurant Ventures.

RULING:
ARGUED AND THE COURT DENIED PLAINTIFF AMBER INDIA CORPORATION, A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION'S Preliminary Injunction After An Order To Show Cause Issued By The Court. The court denied the TRO WITHOUT PREJUDICE. Prevailing part to prepare form of order. JUDGE: RONALD E. QUIDACHAY, REPORTER: BELDON YEE, CSR# 2647 (302/REQ/HE)
